manual_validation.evidence: User-authorized waiver (2026-07-01). Automated parity proves structural byte-identity across all observable layers: AC-PARITY-1 (getChakraTheme ALLOWLIST toEqual frozen S0 baseline, all 5 themes + full-extend guard), AC-UX-1 (useThemeStyles 6-field BoxProps frozen-locked, diffed vs git HEAD), AC-UX-2 (icon ids frozen-locked vs git HEAD), AC-FONT-1 (font URL byte-equal). Theme e2e 27/27 green (settings-theming, banner-decor, profile). Pixel/glyph-level visual confirmation deferred to user post-commit.

gate_runs.detail: 10 modules audited (86.6% overall); real gap in contrast.ts closed via contrast.hexParsing.test.ts (48 tests, 81.6%→93.9%); others passed/skipped

27/27 theme-relevant specs + 32/32 other fast specs + 215/216 groups/DM passed. The 1 failure (groups-direct-chat-no-duplicates: message-after-reload) is a confirmed FLAKE — passed on isolated re-run (2/2); in DM/relay code the epic did NOT touch. No theme e2e regression.
Opus (resumable) clean, 0 findings; both structural checks pass (no cross-module reach-ins, no contract/doc drift). Codex Stage-2 user-authorized skip (Opus-only, credit outage).
